name: Dell XPS 13 Plus – Intel Core i7, 16GB RAM
description: The Dell XPS 13 Plus delivers powerful Intel Core i7 performance with a sleek premium design. Perfect for professionals and students looking for speed, reliability and portability.

name: Apple MacBook Air M2 – 8GB RAM
description: The Apple MacBook Air M2 offers incredible performance with Apple's powerful M2 chip. Lightweight, fast and perfect for work, study and creative tasks.

name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro – 128GB
description: The Apple iPhone 15 Pro features a powerful A17 chip, stunning display and advanced camera system designed for photography and performance.
